creator: utisoft@gmail.com
text:
Maintainer of finance/openerp-web,

We have received a PR to update openerp-web to 6.0.2, although
unfortunately one of our developers has found some problems and the
submitter hasn't been able to fix it.

Please would you investigate, and if possible submit a fixed patch?

The full text of the PR can be found at:
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/158904

Chris Rees
crees@FreeBSD.org
